meta.title: Run Code Llama on a Mac with an M1 Chip
meta.description:
**Jupyter Code Llama**
A Chat Assistant built on Llama 2.

Github repo for free notebook: https://github.com/TrelisResearch/jupyter-code-llama

**Jupyter Code Llama PRO**
- Save and re-load chats.
- Upload pdf or text files for analysis.
- Get access here: https://buy.stripe.com/dR65l6f4p95V7AI6oA.

Copyright © 2023 Trelis LTD. Commercial License.

Find Trelis on [HuggingFace](https://huggingface.co/Trelis) and [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@TrelisResearch).

00:00 Introduction to Code Llama on a Mac
00:27 Llama Setup with a Jupyter Notebook
01:28 Installing JupyterLab for Llama
02:45 How do I install Llama.cpp
03:44 Which ggml or gguf to select for Llama
06:45 How to increase Llama context?
07:00 Jupyter Code Llama PRO!
07:55 How to analyse a file with Llama?
08:40 How to save a chat with Llama?
